Appearances:
Plaintiff, N.R. Patel is present.
Attorney, Arnold Evje, appearing for the plaintiff.
Defendant, Valerie Mcafee, is present.
Attorney, Sean Stenstrom , representing the defendant through limited scope.
The Judge Pro Tem Dennis Hyde, litigants and counsel confer privately in Dept. 207, for settlement discussions.
The parties enter into a signed agreement, which was filed.
This case settled, the trial date of AUG-09-2010 is vacated.
